reviews.title: Samsung S21
reviews.text: Bought for my Samsung S21 phone. Great sound and feel comfortable.

reviews.title: Excellent backup headphones
reviews.text: The thin wires look fragile, but so far so good. I had forgotten how essential good wired headphones are. I no longer make a fool of myself with audio problems during meetings.

reviews.title: Excellent product
reviews.text: I typically don't care for in-ear headphones but got these so I can talk on my cell while doing chores around the house.  They not only came the same day, but they fit my S21+ perfectly and the sound is great!  I'm so glad I took the plunge and purchased them.  Also love the little case they came with.  Great price for everything.

reviews.title: Phone does not ring in earbuds.
reviews.text: I would have given a 5-star review, but my S20 FE 5G rings out loud for everyone to hear rather than in the earbuds.  I purchased these earbuds to listen to music at the office.  When my phone rings, the volume of the ring matches the volume of the music, which would be fine, except that it's not ringing in the earbuds.  It rings out loud, which disturbs those around me.

reviews.title: OK Headphones
reviews.text: I think these headphones are more like 3.5 stars but I rounded up.  I have kind of a small head for an adult female, and still these headphones were too tight.  Usually I can wear headphones made for kids but not these.  These are definitely for smaller heads and small ears since the ear cups get painful after a while since they aren't big enough to fully cover my ears.  The sound is o.k., nothing to write home about, but for the price (as of this review these head phones cost $19.44) I think they are worth it.  Great for kids, not so good for adults, even if you are a pinhead.

reviews.title: High quality headphones
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 4th grade child to use at school. It is hard to find headphones with plug-ins and that aren't wireless. For my son, the ones with a plug are best to use his school issued ipad. These are sturdy and I'm hoping they last the entire school year.

reviews.title: Not really for large heads.
reviews.text: All the talk about "classroom" and "child's" in the Amazon listing really means "this is a small headset." It's not big enough for me. I have a large (7 3/4) head and this thing actually hurts my ears (presses on them too hard). If you need headphones for a child then this would work just fine. Not for me.

reviews.title: Good headphones for kids
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 6 yr old. They fit her great and don’t get so loud that they can damage her ears.

Obviously the designers did not consider anyone was stupid enough to sleep in the earbuds but yes, I am that stupid.  ;-)

reviews.title: Quality case, needs key ring hook or lanyard
reviews.text: This case looks great.  The air pod pro case fits perfectly, and does not slide out.  The top cap piece adheres fine, all without adhesive.  I really wish it were designed to allow a key ring or some sort of lanyard to attach to my keys.  I carry the case in pocket and always fear it falling out.

reviews.title: Outstanding value!
reviews.text: Highly recommended for anyone needing an Air Pod Pro cover!

reviews.title: Fantastic Quality And Presentation!
reviews.text:
MONOCARBON came in hot with this lite weight protective carbon fiber shell. When opening the box I was kind of surprised the presentation looked really nice. In the box was included ( Carbon Fiber Shell, Lanyard, Cards with info on it, even included a little piece of carbon fiber to keep)

The shell weight is about 8 grams, and is 0.6mm thick. The hole cutouts are precise. Seems very durable and looks like it would withstand some drops and help protect from scratches when it's inside your pocket. The include lanyard is a nice touch and it makes use with the built in lanyard spot in the AirPods itself.

I overall would recommend this product for your EDC especially if you like carbon fiber and light weight / non bulky cases.

reviews.title: A very minimal sleek case for the airPods Pro 2
reviews.text:
I have purchased this brand before for my apple watch series 6 titanium, Ive only had the shell for two days before it decided to walk away, or fell off and went byby. There was no adhesion to the watch and little effort will cause it to come off. Thank you guys for your concern about what we think about your product. Great customer service!

With that said, This case is no different with the top half, it will slip off with out you knowing.

They have no adhesive strips like others will include. I guess they have to high of confidence in their product. Nice as it is, I would expect more.

I have purchase thin strip double sided adhesive through amazon to have around when needed. This was no exception.

Now that I had to vent my concern with their product, I was prepared with handling this concern.

The bottom shell is no problem since the opening for the lanyard will secure the bottom shell, I have added a small strip of double sided adhesive to the sides of the top half shell.

These are the most minimal light weight hardshell cases you can buy, the look great and feel’s great and will take any reasonable
punishment you can give it and
protect what is important.

The packaging is nice, too nice, they could have spent less on the box and a little more on protecting the investment, like adhesive. They do have decals in a strip, if this was to prevent cases from slipping off, you could have fooled me. There was no instructions in the box on anything, 🤔.

Don’t let my concern detour you from making the investment.

reviews.title: Refurb- came coated with previous owner's ear wax - Yuck !  UPDATE !
reviews.text:
non hygenic refurb process disappoints- didn't try the super gross earbuds

UPDATE - I spent the extra $20 for a new set. these have issues. the earbuds turn on by themselves in the case and:
1.) hijack the phone connection
2.) use up all the battery, then charge up, and then run down the battery...so when you go to use the earbuds, the batteries are drained in earbuds and the case

other reviewers write of similar problem

skullcandy chat says they think the case needs to be replaced- I can send them in and wait a few weeks for their warranty repair. but it appears these issues are in the design

or return to amazon within the return period.

yes, that.

reviews.title: Nice sound
reviews.text: These have become my favorite earbuds love the voice activated commands

reviews.title: Stopped Charging
reviews.text: Stopped charging after a month. Return window just expired a few days ago. Now I have to deal with returning through Skullcandy

reviews.title: Comfort!
reviews.text: So the sound quality is good, battery life is good but for me the most important point is they are comfortable. I've been through a LOT of ear buds in search of something that I can wear for several hours without my ears starting to hurt and these are them! Charging case doesn't feel very substantial, but since I don't need to charge them every couple of hours I can live with it.

reviews.title: Interesting app
reviews.text: I've been using these earbuds for several weeks now, and they're as good as any pair I have. And I have several. They connect without issue and have good, clear sound. If you're looking for the intricasies of fine tuning, how good is the base and all that, I'm not the gal for you. However, I think music sounds great, and they're perfect for listening to YouTube vids on my computer and audio books on my phone. The app is interesting. At first I thought I could talk directly to my buds. "Hey, Skullcandy!" (First earbuds I've had with voice control.) But you have to use the app for that feature. Not quite as convenient in my opinion, although perhaps I was expecting too much. The controls are not touch, but require clicking on the individual buds to control them. You can also control them through the app, though. Instructions are clear and easy to understand. I was up and running in minutes. All in all, I think they are excellent and definitely worth the price tag.

title: FXWONTY Wireless Headset, Bluetooth Headset with AI Noise Cancelling Microphone & Charging Base, 50Hrs Bluetooth 5.0 Headphones with USB for PC/Remote Work/Call Center/Online Class/Trucker/Zoom/Skype
features: [AI NOISE CANCELLATION & MUTE FUNCTION]FXWONTY wireless headset for computer Qualcomm chip QCC3020 equipped with AI environmental noise cancelation microphone, it can eliminate up to 99.99% of the ambient noise. So you can hear and be heard clearly wherever you are. It's perfect for remote work. When you want to mute your voice during the call, just pressing the mute button on the microphone, ensuring that you can easily switch to a private conversation.

[LONG BATTERY LIFE & CONVENIENT CHARGING BASE]The bluetooth headset is equipped with a 400mAh battery that provides up to 50 hours of talk time and 400 hours of standby time.It's perfect for office, home, remote working, call center. Wireless headset for computer designed with a charging base, you can easily drop the headset in it for a charge, the headset can also be charged with the USB-C charging cable directly. It only takes 2 hours to fully charge.

[BLUETOOTH HEADSET WITH USB DONGLE & WIDE COMPATIBILITY]Wireless headset adopts bluetooth 5.0. The pairing process is fast, efficient and stable.The bluetooth headset with microphone can work for computers, cell phones, laptop, pc tablets& any bluetooth devices. It will also come with the USB dongle, so you don't need to worry about the compatibility issue any more. For devices without Bluetooth function, you can use our USB dongle to connect.

[COMFORTABLE EARMUFFS & ROTATABLE MICROPHONE]The USB wireless headset with microphone is comfortable to wear, with soft& breathable earmuffs& adjustable headband design to fit different head types. In addition, the rotatable microphone can be used on the right or left. The single ear wireless headset is suitable for call center, remote work, office, home, classroom, online courses, receptionist, construction sites, teams, zoom, skype and other life needs.

[REMOTE WORKING RANGE & HANDS-FREE CALLS]The bluetooth 5.0 headset for pc has a wireless working range of up to 49 feet/15 meters, even a distance away from the connected device for a short time, call quality will not be affected. Hands-free function: click MFB to answer / hang up the cell phone (only for mobile phones); If you have any problem of the product, pls free to contact us, the customer service team will provide you with quality solutions.

reviews.title: Big Lag
reviews.text: I use this headset for working from home, and every phone call is a struggle due to lag. I am constantly talking over people or being talked over by them. It's functional, but not ideal perhaps for phone calls.

reviews.title: Big Upgrade for me!!
reviews.text: These are fantastic!  I had a pair that pooped out in less than a year, I got these with my fingers crossed and so far they are a BIG UPGRADE!!! Voice clarity & noise canceling are great!  I work from home with 2 big dogs, it matters for me.

reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.text: I really like this headset.  I love the charging station as I often woukd forget to charge my last headset that was charged with usb cable.  My only issue with the headset is that the headband is not adjustable and I have a smaller head so the support bar sits a little low.  Very good connection and stays connected if I move around the house.

reviews.title: It Won't Charge
reviews.text: It worked wonderfully for a couple months and now it won't charge. I have switched outlets thinking it was my outlet. I also make sureits lined up in charging base. I loved it until it stopped working. Its a little pricey to only get 2 month use.

reviews.title: Comfortable for truckers and the office.
reviews.text:
I am a dispatcher and I have to wear a headset 8hrs a day. I can stand this one for about 6 hrs. before I need to switch ears. That is better than most headsets I have used. My office orders $300 headsets and this one can throw down with the best of them. The noise cancelation is excellent and the calls sound loud and clear. The Bluetooth connection last the entire 8+ hour shift. Once paired it connects seamlessly when I set up for my day.

Before you spend hundreds of dollars on a headset, give this one a chance. I am glad I did.

I hope this helps. :-)

title: Arae Electronic Organizer, Travel Cable Organizer, Portable Waterproof Pouch, All-in-One Electronic Accessories Storage Case for Cable, Cord, Charger, Phone, Earphone-Large (Gray)
features: [Large capacity]-The Size of the cable storage travel case: 9.25" x 6.69" x 0.6". Internal zippered mesh pockets could hold your different tech gadgets like cables, cords, charger, earphone, USB drives and SD cards, suit for ipad mini 1-5(7.9inch) easily separate and keep them in place.

reviews.title: I'm not keen on the cover material
reviews.text:
While the Arae Electronic Organizer does what it says, its implementation isn't great.

The double layers of this product has one and a half flap of elastic bands to hold bundled up wires, that's 18 spots total. The rest are two large pockets and a small pocket. That's plenty of room to carry most charging accessories that you'd have with you if you were equipped with tablets and phones. For laptops and cameras, you'll need other solutions. Even action camera chargers may have a hard time fitting in this slim product.

It's not a problem that this thing is pretty much made out of nylon from the outside in but the material that makes up the exterior of this product makes it look cheap. It's a rough, synthetic material that just makes it a bit cheap looking. I think cloth or leather would have been a better choice.

In addition, the zipper sticks, making it hard to quickly open this up to retrieve your wires for charging.

reviews.title: Case closed
reviews.text:
It's pretty amazing how much this will hold and still close up properly. I am using it for many cables and some adapters, and I am also keeping those little instruction manuals that come with everything in one of the zipper pouches. You can keep a lot of cables and adapters in this, and it will still zip up and be small enough for travel.
I like this case a lot.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected
reviews.text: Water proof? Not going to try that. This is super slim so you can't really fit a whole lot in. Wires, maybe... but devices, like portable routers, not exactly. Slim portable chargers, sure. Higher capacity batteries, nope. Won't fit anything more than two iPhones thick.

reviews.title: No More Ziplock Bags
reviews.text: This is such a better alternative to tossing cables into a ziplock bag.  The nice bag with zipper allows me to keep everything in one place.  I wished the compartments were a little wider, but it's easy to just use two compartments. Nice quality bag, once I get spares I would just pack these with a spare ready and be ready to go anytime.  Nice organization addition to my travel gear.

reviews.title: Handy little case
reviews.text: Does a good job at cutting down on cable clutter. I took a black Sharpie and identified the various cords by writing abbreviations on the cloth stretch band that secures the cords. It also helps organize miscellaneous adapters and charging units. Not sure how long it will last but for organizing cords and small electronic items it’s a good buy.

reviews.title: Unusably uncomfortable
reviews.text:
Feels premium in the hand.
Sound amazing for in-ear headphones at this price point.
Gets unbearably uncomfortable after 10 minutes in my ears. I have normal sized ears, but the shoulder of even the smallest the ear hooks dig in and hurt terribly really quickly. Super disappointing, as the sound quality is really good for the price. Returning and continuing to use my $17 Anker buds that are as comfortable as can be (though, admittedly they have anemic bass)

reviews.title: High quality ear buds
reviews.text:
These work great on my iPhone but do not connect to my laptop. I tried everything and they won’t work on my laptop at all. They connected in seconds to my iPhone though.

The sound quality is crisp and clear. The battery life has been great and I’m overall happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Great value for the money
reviews.text: Are use this for the gym they’re pretty comfortable and they kind of stay in my ears were none of the others do. I must have small inner ears ,but the sound is fine I haven’t spoken to anybody on the phone yet to hear if I sound clear, but as far as the music goes it does the job!

reviews.title: Fantastic headphones
reviews.text: I’m just now ordering my second pair. Original pair still work, but the cord is finally stiff and cracking after thousands of miles cycling, hiking, and hundreds of hours in the gym. I see a lot of people complaining about the mic, I don’t think I’ve ever used that function so I can’t speak to that.  However, the sound quality is better than my iPod Pros, and they still sound great at 25mph on the bike, I’ve never once had an issue with wind noise or of them falling out.  Great value for the money.

title: Bose SIE2i Sport Headphones - Purple
description:
Product Description
Push your workout to the limit with headphones that are up to the task. Bose SIE2i sport headphones, customized for select Apple devices, are specifically engineered for exercise. They're sweat- and weather-resistant, stay comfortably yet securely in place and deliver robust Bose sound to keep you energized - a combination of benefits conventional sport ear buds can't match. Plus, the inline remote and microphone let you control music on your iPhone or iPod and take calls with one-touch ease.
From the Manufacturer
Bose® SIE2i sport headphones
Tonally balanced audio with crisp highs and deep lows
Tonally balanced audio with crisp highs and deep lows
StayHear ear tips remain in place even during strenuous workouts
StayHear ear tips remain in place even during strenuous workouts
Sweat- and weather-resistance, using hydrophobic acoustic cloth
Sweat- and weather-resistance, using hydrophobic acoustic cloth
Inline remote/mic controls music and takes calls with the press of a button
Inline remote/mic controls music and takes calls with the press of a button
Reebok fitness armband holds your audio device during exercise
Reebok fitness armband holds your audio device during exercise
Engineered for exercise™
Push your workout to the limit with headphones that are up to the task. Bose SIE2i sport headphones, customized for select Apple devices, are specifically engineered for exercise. They're sweat- and weather-resistant, stay comfortably yet securely in place and deliver robust Bose sound to keep you energized—a combination of benefits conventional sport earbuds can't match. Plus, the inline remote and microphone let you control music on your iPhone or iPod and take calls with one-touch ease.
Water-resistant cloth keeps rain and sweat away from the headphones' speakers
Energizing sound. Bold style.
Exclusive TriPort headphone technology delivers wide-range sound, including the deep, convincing lows that give your music—and your workout—its pulse. And because it comes from an in-ear headphone, you'll feel driven without feeling closed off from your environment—a must when you're running outdoors. These headphones can add extra punch to your exercise routine.
Stability and durability
Our StayHear tips conform securely and comfortably to your ears' shape, even during vigorous workouts. The speaker elements are covered with hydrophobic cloth that keeps moisture out but lets sound pass through. Cables and connections are made extra sturdy. SIE2i sport headphones are made for motion. Even their bold colors (Green, Orange, Blue, Purple) have an energy all their own.
One-touch ease for music and calls
SIE2i sport headphones have an inline remote that offers convenient control over the music on your iPod or iPhone. Skip a tune with the press of a button. No need to touch your device—a great feature for running. There's also an inline microphone for taking calls and switching seamlessly between calls and music.
StayHear tips come in 3 sizes (S, M, L)
Reebok fitness armband
There's another great workout feature—the exclusive Reebok armband. It holds your music device in place when you're exercising, and stores the headphones when you're not. It even has a separate pocket for your keys. It's made of stretchy, breathable fabric that adjusts to fit most smartphones and MP3 players, and has a touch-sensitive window for easy usability. Available in colors to match your SIE2i sport headphones.
What's in the box
SIE2i sport headphones
SIE2i sport headphones
3 pairs StayHear tips (S, M, L)
3 pairs StayHear tips (S, M, L)
Exclusive Reebok fitness armband
Exclusive Reebok fitness armband
Clothing clip
Clothing clip
Extension cable
Extension cable
Reebok armband holds your music device in place while working out, and comes in colors to match your SIE2i sport headphones
features: Tonally balanced audio with crisp highs and deep lows
Stay Hear ear tips remain in place even during strenuous workouts
Sweat- and weather-resistance, using hydrophobic acoustic cloth
Inline remote/mic controls music and takes calls with the press of a button
Reebok fitness armband holds your audio device during exercise
Connectivity Technology: Wired

reviews.title: Best headphones I have ever had
reviews.text: With Bose, you never have to worry about the sound quality.  It is excellent as usual.  The 3 different sized of ear pieces provided allow for a personalized fit.  They stay in place during all sorts of activities (running, yard work, etc..) and the soft earpieces are very comfortable.  The cord is split into 2 pieces which can be very convenient at times.  Without the extension, it works perfectly for an arm/exercise band.  With the extension, you can stick the phone in your pocket, backpack, etc..  and have some cord to spare.  The connection between the extension and the main cord is large and will make the cord feel heavy at times.  My ONLY complaint is that the cord is made of a very "rubbery" material and it tends to catch on itself (if you wind it up when not in use, it is a little tough to untangle it).  Other than that, I love these headphones.  I liked mine so much, I bought a second pair for my wife, who uses them regularly as well.  HIGHLY recommended.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Very comfortably for running in.  Can hardly feel them.  I like how you can still hear things around you.

reviews.title: Bose sport headphones
reviews.text:
Fantastic Bose sound.
The assortment of earpieces fit with no problem and the additional stabilizers don't allow the earbuds to fall out! even when on the elliptical trainer.
A great deal. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Favorite running headphone, worth the splurge.
reviews.text: I've had these headphones for over 2 years with no complaints. I used to go through headphones on a monthly basis, but Bose provided me with the quality and durability I was looking for with sport headphones. I one time accidentally put these headphones in the washer and dryer, because they were left in my pocket, and they still work with no defects. (Sweat-proof and maybe even waterproof) They are great for staying safe while running or biking outdoors, while still providing excellent Bose sound quality. I like the interchangeable earpieces for the perfect fit and comfort while running. There is no need to readjust or worry about the earpieces falling out or getting yanked out. The versatile cord length was a bonus for less cord hassle, but if this product were to be upgraded I might suggest a flat cord for less tangle during storage.

reviews.title: Great in ear head phones.
reviews.text: Use almost daily with iPhone. Good sound, good quality very water resistant. The extension cable is a nice touch. You won't be disappointed. NO heavy Bass, just crystal clear music.

reviews.title: Solves AirPod Issue
reviews.text: I have a love/hate relationship with my AirPods and these are making me love them a LOT more. On their own, my AirPods cause my ears to hurt terribly. Not to mention, they fall out at the slightest movement, like smiling or turning my head. Talk about ANNOYING. These tips cure those ailments. Now I can exercise with my AirPods in and never worry about them falling out. I have tiny ears, and the fit is great with no discomfort at all. I love that the little hook sticks up into the cartilage of my ear to make a really secure fit. The silicon keeps the buds from irritating my ears too. I’m so happy I got these. Now I can actually put my AirPods to good use.

reviews.title: These Really Help to Keep the AirPods 2nd gen in Place.
reviews.text: The only issue I've every had with my AirPods is them staying in while active. These are comfortable and keep them in place along with them being comfortable.

reviews.text: OnePlus earbuds sound great but fall out of My ears. These ear tips fit the OnePlus earbuds great and are comfortable in my years. Earbuds stay in my ears where they should be. Problem solved!
